name: Quotex
description: Quotex is one of the most popular binary options trading platforms, offering fast trade execution, a user-friendly interface, and extensive asset coverage including Forex, crypto, commodities, and OTC markets.

name: Pocket Option
description: Pocket Option is a versatile binary options broker with social trading features, achievement rewards, and support for over 100 trading assets across multiple markets.

name: IQ Option
description: IQ Option is a globally recognized trading platform offering binary options, digital options, CFDs, and Forex trading with an award-winning interface and powerful charting tools.

name: Olymp Trade
description: Olymp Trade is a trusted online trading platform offering fixed-time trades and Forex trading, known for its educational resources, low entry barrier, and beginner-friendly design.
features: Fixed-time trades with up to 90% payout

name: Binomo
description: Binomo is a popular trading platform for binary options, offering tournament-style competitions, professional charting tools, and accessible accounts starting from just $10.

name: Exnova
description: Exnova is a modern binary options trading platform built on proven technology, offering digital options, CFDs, and a clean interface optimized for both beginners and experienced traders.
